mapper.select: SELECT c.channel_id as channelId, c.company_id as companyId, c.channel_type as channelType, c.channel_name as channelName, c.manager_id as managerId, u.user_name as managerName, c.status as status, c.sort_order as sortOrder, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt FROM tb_channel c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.manager_id = u.user_id WHERE c.channel_id = #{channelId}

SELECT c.channel_id as channelId, c.company_id as companyId, c.channel_type as channelType, c.channel_name as channelName, c.manager_id as managerId, u.user_name as managerName, c.status as status, c.sort_order as sortOrder, c.created_at as createdAt, c.updated_at as updatedAt FROM tb_channel c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.manager_id = u.user_id WHERE c.manager_id = #{managerId} AND c.status != 'INACTIVE' ORDER BY c.channel_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_channel ( company_id, channel_type, channel_name, manager_id, status, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{channelType}, #{channelName}, #{managerId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_channel SET channel_type = #{channelType}, channel_name = #{channelName}, manager_id = #{managerId}, status = COALESCE(#{status}, status), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), updated_at = NOW() WHERE channel_id = #{channelId}
